## Checklist

- [ ] Code is documented (docstrings + inline comments)
- [ ] Existing E2E tests pass (`rasa test e2e --e2e-tests e2e_tests/`)
- [ ] No commented-out code or debug prints
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new config keys are added
- [ ] Tested with a real Rasa Pro instance (if touching dialogue logic)
